user.title: Connect to OpenDTU
user.description: Enter the connection details for your OpenDTU instance.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of your OpenDTU device
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll for new data (default: 30s)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to OpenDTU. Check the host and port.

abort.already_configured: This OpenDTU instance is already configured.
